# Soft fail-safe for docker GHCR when token missing — keep secrets documented
# Required repository secrets for full deploy:
#
# VITE_API_URL
# VITE_SOCKET_URL
# VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY
# VITE_MAP_PROVIDER (optional)
# RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK
# VERCEL_TOKEN
# VERCEL_ORG_ID
# VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
#
# Also configure Render env vars for Mongo Atlas, Redis, AWS S3, JWT_SECRET, etc.
